claim_support.reason: Material financial growth claims (Revenue 7.33% YoY, NI -12.43% YoY) are not supported by the absolute financial data provided in the evidence ($15.031B vs $13.041B Revenue implies 15.26% YoY, not 7.33%). The claims rely on calculation objects that mislabel sequential growth as year-over-year, failing the internal consistency requirement for trust.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical errors in Year-Over-Year growth rates. Revenue YoY growth is stated as 7.33% but absolute figures ($15.031B vs $13.041B) calculate to 15.26%. Net Income YoY decline is stated as 12.43% but absolute figures ($1.726B vs $2.059B) calculate to 16.17%. The provided calculation objects incorrectly label sequential quarter-over-quarter growth as year-over-year.

citation_precision.reason: Citations correctly map to the provided evidence chunks and calculation objects. No mismatches between inline references and authoritative ID lists.

temporal_validity.reason: All news dates and financial periods are on or before the report as-of date (2025-11-17). No post-as-of claims detected.

consistency.reason: Internal inconsistency between absolute financial figures and stated growth percentages within the same paragraphs (e.g., Financial Analysis Para 1 states $15.031B vs $13.041B revenue but claims 7.33% growth, which is mathematically contradictory).

unsupported_claims.explanation: Claim of 7.33% Year-Over-Year revenue growth is not supported by the cited absolute revenue evidence ($15.031B Q3 2025 vs $13.041B Q3 2024 equals 15.26% growth).
unsupported_claims.section: Recent Developments Paragraph 3; Financial Analysis Paragraph 1

unsupported_claims.explanation: Claim of 12.43% Year-Over-Year net income decline is not supported by the cited absolute net income evidence ($1.726B Q3 2025 vs $2.059B Q3 2024 equals 16.17% decline).
unsupported_claims.offending_span: net income declined 12.43% to $1.726 billion compared to the prior year period

numerical_errors.explanation: Revenue Year-Over-Year growth calculated as 7.33% based on provided absolute numbers is incorrect; actual YoY growth is 15.26%. The 7.33% figure represents Quarter-Over-Quarter growth mislabeled as YoY.
numerical_errors.section: Recent Developments Paragraph 3; Financial Analysis Paragraph 1

numerical_errors.explanation: Net Income Year-Over-Year decline calculated as 12.43% is incorrect; actual YoY decline is 16.17%. The 12.43% figure represents Quarter-Over-Quarter decline mislabeled as YoY.

inconsistencies.explanation: Contradiction between absolute revenue figures ($15.031B vs $13.041B) and stated growth rate (7.33%) within the same paragraph.
inconsistencies.offending_span: quarterly revenue reaching $15,031,000,000, representing a 7.33% year-over-year increase compared to Q3 2024 revenue of $13,041,000,000

financial_numeric.reason: Skipped because the report failed the Accuracy Gate due to severe unsupported claims, numerical errors, inconsistencies.
